GoogleAIStudioTTS.description: Convert text to speech with Google AI Studio Gemini TTS models.

text.name: Text
text.tooltip: Text content to synthesize into speech.

api_key.name: API Key
api_key.tooltip: Your Google AI Studio API key, or an environment placeholder like $(GOOGLE_API_KEY).

voice.name: Voice
voice.tooltip: Voice preset used for speech synthesis.

instruction_prefix.name: Instruction Prefix
instruction_prefix.tooltip: Optional style instruction prepended before the text.

GoogleAIStudioMultiSpeakerTTS.description: Convert a multi-speaker transcript to speech with Google AI Studio Gemini TTS models.

transcript.name: Transcript
transcript.tooltip: Transcript where each line starts with a speaker name followed by a colon.

api_key.name: API Key
api_key.tooltip: Your Google AI Studio API key, or an environment placeholder like $(GOOGLE_API_KEY).

model.name: Model
model.tooltip: Gemini multi-speaker TTS model to use.

speaker1_name.name: Speaker 1 Name
speaker1_name.tooltip: Display name of the first speaker.

speaker2_name.name: Speaker 2 Name
speaker2_name.tooltip: Display name of the second speaker.

speaker3_name.name: Speaker 3 Name
speaker3_name.tooltip: Optional display name of the third speaker.

speaker4_name.name: Speaker 4 Name
speaker4_name.tooltip: Optional display name of the fourth speaker.

GoogleAIStudioTextGen.description: Generate text with Google AI Studio Gemini models.

api_key.name: API Key
api_key.tooltip: Your Google AI Studio API key, or an environment placeholder like $(GOOGLE_API_KEY).

system_instruction.name: System Instruction
system_instruction.tooltip: Optional system instruction that guides the model behavior.

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.tooltip: Controls randomness in generation. Lower is more deterministic.

max_output_tokens.name: Max Output Tokens
max_output_tokens.tooltip: Maximum number of tokens the model may generate.

thinking_level.name: Thinking Level
thinking_level.tooltip: Reasoning depth for supported Gemini models.

GoogleAIStudioImageGen.description: Generate or edit images with Gemini image models and Imagen models.

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.tooltip: Main prompt used to generate the image.

api_key.name: API Key
api_key.tooltip: Your Google AI Studio API key, or an environment placeholder like $(GOOGLE_API_KEY).

input_image.name: Input Image
input_image.tooltip: Optional source image for editing. Supported by Gemini image models.

negative_prompt.name: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.tooltip: Content you want to avoid in the generated image.

safety_filter_level.name: Safety Filter Level
safety_filter_level.tooltip: Safety filtering level for Imagen models.

person_generation.name: Person Generation
person_generation.tooltip: Human generation policy for Imagen models.
